hero.title: Iinkqubo zobunjineli ezilinganisa
hero.subtitle: Isoftware yeShishini · I-AI kunye nokuFunda ngoMatshini · Iziseko zelifu · I-IoT kunye ne-Edge
hero.description: Ukusuka kwi-automation ekrelekrele ukuya kumaqonga elifu, siyila kwaye sihambisa itekhnoloji enika amandla amashishini amabhongo - ngexesha, kuhlahlo-lwabiwo mali, kwisikali.

services.subtitle: Iinkonzo zethu
services.title: Ubunjineli obupheleleyo
services.description: Iindawo ezintandathu zokuziqhelanisa. Iqela elinye. Uluhlu ngalunye lwetekhnoloji yakho yetekhnoloji - ukusuka kwizixhobo zomda ukuya kwiideshibhodi zeshishini.

customSoftware.title: Uphuhliso lwesoftware yesiko
customSoftware.description: Izicelo zanamhlanje ezakhiwe nge-microservices, ii-API, kunye nolwakhiwo lwelifu.

aiMl.title: I-AI, i-ML kunye ne-Business Intelligence
aiMl.description: Imibhobho ye-AI / ML, iideshibhodi ze-Power BI, kunye nohlalutyo oluphambili oluguqula idatha ibe zizigqibo.

cloud.title: Uyilo lwelifu kunye neziseko zophuhliso
cloud.description: Iziseko zelifu elininzi ezinezikhongozeli, ezingenaseva, kunye nokusabalalisa kwehlabathi eyakhelwe ngaphakathi.

iot.title: I-IoT kunye ne-Edge Computing
iot.description: Izixhobo ezixhunyiwe, amawele edijithali, kunye nekhompyuter ye-edge ye-Industry 4.0.

devops.title: I-DevOps kunye nobunjineli beqonga
devops.description: Imibhobho ye-CI / CD, iziseko zophuhliso njengekhowudi, kunye nokuqwalaselwa ukusuka kwimveliso.

digital.title: Inguqu yedijithali kunye nokubonisana
digital.description: Isicwangciso setekhnoloji, iimephu zendlela zale mihla, kunye nokubonisana ngezandla.

cta.title: Yakha into enzulu
cta.description: Ukusuka kuphuhliso lwesoftware yesiko kunye nezisombululo ezixhotyiswe yi-AI ukuya kwiziseko zelifu kunye nokuzenzekelayo - sihambisa iinkonzo zetekhnoloji zokuphela ezilungiselelwe iimfuno zakho.

credibility.subtitle: kwik kwik
credibility.title: Iziphumo, <gradient>hayi izithembiso</gradient>
credibility.description: Ukusuka eSarajevo ukuya eOslo, eAmsterdam naseBerlin. Iinkqubo zeshishini zihanjiswa ngexesha, ngalo lonke ixesha.

atlascopco.label: I-Cloud IAM ye-Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Uyile iziseko zokuqala ze-One Identity ze-Atlas Copco kwi-Azure Kubernetes, ukunciphisa iindleko ngelixa kugcinwa ukuthotyelwa kweshishini.

orange.label: Iqonga le-Orange Cyberdefense
orange.outcome: Ukuphuhliswa kweziseko zophuhliso ze-Azure Kubernetes, imibhobho ye-CI / CD, kunye nokudityaniswa kwe-ServiceNow yesiko kwinkampani ekhokelayo ye-cybersecurity yaseYurophu.

telecom.label: I-Telecom GIS kunye ne-AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Yakhiwe iqonga le-GIS imephu yezixhobo ezingaphantsi komhlaba eJamani ngokufumanisa ukungqubana okuthintela umonakalo weziseko zophuhliso ezigidi ze-Euro.

iot.label: I-Cloud IoT kunye neQonga le-Edge
iot.outcome: I-Azure IoT Hub ilawula amawaka ezixhobo, i-Synapse ilungisa iibhiliyoni zemiqolo ye-telemetry, kunye nokuhlanganiswa komda ukunciphisa iindleko zemiyalezo nge ~ 90%.

drone.label: Iqonga ledrone elizimeleyo
drone.outcome: Umlawuli wenqwelomoya wesiko kunye ne-4G-to-Azure IoT Hub ibhulorho evumela iinqwelomoya ezizimeleyo ze-BVLOS zokubeka iliso kwezolimo kunye nokuhanjiswa kwemithwalo.

payment.label: Ukuhlangulwa kweNkqubo yeNtlawulo
payment.outcome: Ukuhlangulwa kwesango lokuhlawula elisilelayo kwi-app yeselfowuni yaseNorway ngokubuyisela umva ikhowudi yelifa engabhalwanga. Ixesha lokuhlawula i-zero emva kokuhlaziywa.

game.label: I-AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Yakha iplagi yeMaya eyakha imodeli ye-3D kunye nexesha loopopayi nge-50% kwisitudiyo esikhulu se-AAA, samkelwe njengesixhobo esiqhelekileyo kumbhobho wemveliso.

social.label: Iqonga leNtlalo elisekwe kwiNdawo
social.outcome: Uyilo lwe-app yokuthandana yendawo yasebusuku yaseSpain kunye nokuthelekisa i-geolocation, imiyalezo yexesha lokwenyani, kunye nezaziso zokutyhala kumthengi wase-UK.

iga.label: Iqonga le-IGA le-Multi-Tenant
iga.outcome: Yakhelwe i-backend engundoqo yeqonga lolawulo lwesazisi selifu elikhonza abathengi be-Fortune 500 nge-ASP.NET ye-Core Identity ye-NoSQL kwinqanaba leshishini.

euAdjacent.title: I-EU-Adjacent, Ukuhanjiswa kweHlabathi
euAdjacent.description: Iiyure zokusebenza ze-CET ezinamava abandakanya iNorway, iNetherlands, iJamani, nangaphaya.

yourEngineers.title: Iinjineli zakho, hayi umthengisi
yourEngineers.description: Amalungu eqela azinikeleyo afakwe kwindlela yakho yokusebenza kunye nezixhobo. Akukho baphathi beakhawunti, akukho migca yetikiti.

hardwareToCloud.title: Izixhobo zekhompyutha ukuya kwilifu
hardwareToCloud.description: Ukusuka kwi-firmware yesixhobo esihlanganisiweyo ukuya kwimibhobho ye-Azure Synapse yeshishini. Isoftware epheleleyo kuyo yonke indawo.

partners.subtitle: Isitaki seTekhnoloji
partners.title: <gradient>Isitaki</gradient> esivavanywe yimfazwe
partners.description: Asisebenzisi nje ezi zixhobo - sithumele iinkqubo zemveliso kunye nazo. Ukusuka kwiMicrosoft Azure ukuya kuKubernetes, iinjineli zethu zibambe ubuchule behlabathi lokwenyani.

cloudInfra.label: Ilifu kunye neziseko zophuhliso
cloudInfra.description: Ulwakhiwo lwamafu amaninzi kunye ne-orchestration yesikhongozeli kunye neziseko zophuhliso njengekhowudi.

frontend.label: I-Frontend
frontend.description: Izikhokelo zecandelo zangoku ezinohlobo lokhuseleko kunye nezixhobo zokwakha ezilungiselelwe.

backend.label: I-Backend kunye ne-API
backend.description: Amaqonga eseva yenqanaba leshishini, iilwimi zeenkqubo, kunye neeparadigms ze-API zanamhlanje.

data.label: Idatha kunye nokugcinwa
data.description: Iivenkile zobudlelwane, amaxwebhu, kunye nememori ngokukhangela okubhaliweyo okupheleleyo.

devops.label: I-DevOps kunye nezixhobo
devops.description: Imibhobho ye-CI / CD, ulawulo lwenguqulo, kunye nemveliso yomphuhlisi.

cloudNative.title: Cloud-Native by Default
cloudNative.description: Yonke iprojekthi iqhutywa, iqhutywa yi-CI / CD, kwaye yakhiwe kwisikali esithe tyaba ukusukela kusuku lokuqala.

fullStack.title: Ukutyibilika okuGcweleyo
fullStack.description: Ukusuka kwi-React frontends ukuya kwi-.NET microservices ukuya kumaqela e-Kubernetes - iqela elinye, ukuphela ukuya esiphelweni.

productionProven.title: Imveliso eqinisekisiweyo
productionProven.description: Ayizizo iitekhnoloji zedemo. Isixhobo ngasinye esidwelisiweyo sinika amandla iinkqubo zokwenyani ezikhonza abasebenzisi bokwenyani namhlanje.

faq.subtitle: Isiseko soLwazi
faq.title: <gradient>Imibuzo</gradient> Ebuzwa Rhoqo
faq.description: Yonke into ekufuneka uyazi malunga nokusebenza ne-Horizon Tech

scope.question: Yeyiphi indawo yomsebenzi wakho?
scope.answer: Sihambisa iiprojekthi zetekhnoloji yokugqibela: isoftware yeshishini yesiko, imibhobho ye-AI / ML, iziseko zelifu, iinkqubo ze-IoT, i-DevOps automation, kunye nokubonisana ngenguqu yedijithali. Nokuba ufuna iqonga elipheleleyo elakhiwe ukusuka ekuqaleni okanye ukudityaniswa okujoliswe kuyo kunye nemfumba yakho esele ikho, siphatha ulwakhiwo, uphuhliso, uvavanyo kunye nokuhanjiswa.

stack.question: Yeyiphi eyona tekhnoloji yakho iphambili?
stack.answer: Isitaki sethu esingundoqo sigxile kumaqonga ekumgangatho weshishini: i-Azure kunye ne-AWS yelifu, i-.NET kunye ne-Node.js ye-backend, i-React kunye ne-Angular ye-frontend, i-Kubernetes kunye ne-Docker ye-orchestration, kunye ne-Terraform yeziseko zophuhliso njengekhowudi. Sisebenza ngokubanzi kunye nePython yomsebenzi we-AI / ML, i-Power BI kunye ne-Fabric ye-intelligence yeshishini, kunye ne-PostgreSQL, i-SQL Server, kunye ne-MongoDB yedatha.

enterprise.question: Ujongana njani neeprojekthi zeshishini?
enterprise.answer: Ukuzibandakanya ngalunye kuqala ngesigaba sokufumanisa ukuchaza ububanzi, ulwakhiwo, kunye neziganeko eziphambili. Ufumana iqela elizinikeleyo elinesikhokelo sobugcisa, uphononongo lweziganeko rhoqo, kunye nokufikelela ngokuthe ngqo kwiinjineli ezakha inkqubo yakho. Silandela i-agile sprints kunye needemos zabachaphazelekayo, sigcina iibhodi zeprojekthi ezibonakalayo, kwaye sibonelela ngeengxelo zenkqubela phambili zeveki.

support.question: Ijongeka njani inkxaso yasemva kokuqaliswa?
support.answer: Sinikezela ngamanqanaba enkxaso acwangcisiweyo kunye nee-SLA ezichaziweyo, kubandakanya ukubeka iliso kwe-24/7, impendulo yesiganeko, ukuphuculwa kokusebenza, kunye nokuphindaphinda kwempawu. Izivumelwano zethu zenkxaso zigubungela ukulungiswa kwe-bug, iipatches zokhuseleko, ukulinganiswa kweziseko zophuhliso, kunye nokuhlolwa kwezempilo okusebenzayo-kulungiselelwe ixesha lakho lokuphumla kunye neemfuno zexesha lokuphendula.

integration.question: Ngaba ungadibana neziseko zethu ezikhoyo?
integration.answer: Ngokuqinisekileyo. Sigxile kuphuculo lwelifa, ukudityaniswa kwe-API yokuqala, kunye nokufuduka kwelifu le-hybrid. Nokuba ufuna ukunxibelelana neenkqubo ze-ERP ezikwindawo, ukufuduka ukusuka kwii-monoliths ukuya kwii-microservices, okanye ukudibanisa isiseko sedatha yelifa kunye nee-frontends zanamhlanje, sineencwadi zokudlala zokufuduka kunye namava okudityaniswa ukuyenza ingabonakali.

industries.question: Ngawaphi amashishini osebenze kuwo?
industries.answer: Iqela lethu lihambise iiprojekthi kwi-fintech, ukhathalelo lwempilo, ukuhanjiswa, i-e-commerce, amandla kunye namacandelo karhulumente. Siyaziqonda iimfuno ezithile zeshishini ezinje nge-PCI-DSS yentlawulo, ukuqwalaselwa kwe-HIPAA kwidatha yezempilo, ukuthotyelwa kwe-GDPR kwiimarike ze-EU, kunye ne-telemetry yexesha lokwenyani ye-IoT yemizi-mveliso.

engagement.question: Ijongeka njani inkqubo yokuzibandakanya?
engagement.answer: Iqala ngomnxeba wokufumanisa ukuqonda iinjongo zakho kunye nendawo yobugcisa. Ukusuka apho, sihambisa uxwebhu lwe-scoping kunye neengcebiso zokwakha, ixesha kunye nokuqhekeka kotyalo-mali. Nje ukuba sivunyiwe, siqala ngeqela elizinikeleyo, sihamba ngezixhobo zakho kunye nokuhamba komsebenzi, kwaye siqale i-sprint yokuqala kwiintsuku ezimbalwa.

faq.ctaDescription: Ngaba unayo iprojekthi engqondweni? Makhe sithethe ngobubanzi, ixesha kunye nohlahlo-lwabiwo mali.
